answer_first: Vacation rental turnover cleaning at Storey Lake, Windsor Hills, and Reunion Resort in Kissimmee, FL ranges from $120 to $500+ per visit in 2026, depending on bedroom count. A typical 4-bedroom resort home costs $190–$255. Pool decks, game rooms, and themed bedrooms are priced as add-ons and quoted per property. Braza Cleaning serves all three gated communities with same-day availability.

sections.h2: What Does Turnover Cleaning Cost at Storey Lake, Windsor Hills & Reunion Resort?
sections.html:
Resort community vacation homes in Kissimmee are not standard residential properties — they are high-occupancy, amenity-rich short-term rentals that demand hotel-grade preparation between every guest stay. Pricing reflects that complexity. Below are current 2026 market rates for professional turnover cleaning at Storey Lake, Windsor Hills, and Reunion Resort, based on Braza Cleaning's real-world quotes across these communities:

Property sizeStandard turnoverDeep turnover (post 7+ night stay)
2 BR / 2 BA$120 – $155$170 – $210
3 BR / 2–3 BA$150 – $195$215 – $275
4 BR / 3–4 BA$190 – $255$270 – $360
5 BR / 4–5 BA$250 – $320$340 – $440
6 BR / 5–6 BA$305 – $390$420 – $540
7–9 BR / 6–8 BA$375 – $500+$510 – $680+

Common add-ons (quoted per property — call for exact rates):

  • Private pool deck: sweep, furniture reset, and waterline wipe — quoted based on deck size and furniture count
  • Game room / arcade: equipment sanitized, surfaces wiped, cables reset — quoted per room configuration
  • Themed or bunk bedrooms: decor handled per host staging guide — quoted per specialty room
  • Linen service: strip, wash, dry, fold, re-make — quoted per bed count; pre-staged linen sets eliminate on-site laundry time

All pricing is per-turnover visit. Recurring contracts (10+ turnovers/month) unlock a locked-in rate that is typically 12–18% below the on-demand price shown above. Text or call (689) 242-7469 for a same-day add-on quote.

sections.h2: How Are Resort Community Homes Different to Clean Than a Regular Rental?
sections.html:
Kissimmee's resort communities attract group travelers, multi-family vacations, and international tourists expecting hotel-quality presentation. That expectation creates a very different workload compared to a standard residential rental or a long-term lease turnover:

  • Private pools & spas — Pool decks need sweeping, furniture reset, and waterline wiping. Loungers, umbrellas, and towel racks must be staged before the next guest arrives.
  • Game rooms & home theaters — Controllers, headsets, and arcade surfaces must be sanitized. Cables untangled, screens cleaned. Missing pieces flagged to the host before check-in.
  • Themed bedrooms — Disney-character, Marvel, princess, and sports-themed rooms are a signature feature at Storey Lake and Windsor Hills properties. Decor items, plush toys, and custom bedding require careful handling and precise placement per the host's staging guide.
  • Bunk rooms & high-capacity bedding — 6–12-bunk configurations take 2–3× the linen time of a standard bedroom. Mattress protectors must be checked after every stay.
  • Full resort kitchens — Large families cook. Grease, crumbs, and stacked cookware are standard post-stay conditions. Dishwasher cycles, appliance wipe-downs, and fridge checks are included in every clean.
  • Gated security check-in — All three communities require the cleaning crew to check in at the gatehouse or use a host-provided access code. A professional cleaning service will have your team registered in advance so there is no delay during tight turnover windows.

These factors are why a 4-bedroom resort home in Storey Lake costs more to turn over than a 4-bedroom house in a standard neighborhood — and why hosts who use a general residential cleaner often end up with missed items and bad reviews.

sections.h2: What's Included in a Professional Resort Community Turnover Clean?
sections.html:
A professional vacation rental turnover at Storey Lake, Windsor Hills, or Reunion Resort covers far more than mopping floors. Every clean by Braza Cleaning includes the following as standard — no surprises, no add-on fees for listed items:

All Bedrooms & Bathrooms

  • Beds stripped, remade with fresh linens (or linen-service sets staged for next guests)
  • All surfaces, nightstands, lamps, and mirrors wiped and streak-free
  • Closets and drawers checked for left-behind guest items
  • Bathrooms: toilet, shower, tub, sink, mirror, floors — hotel-grade finish
  • Towels replaced or folded per host's staging preference
  • Trash emptied and liners replaced

Kitchen & Living Areas

  • Dishes washed, dried, and returned to correct cabinets
  • Stovetop, counters, sink, and exterior of all appliances cleaned
  • Refrigerator checked — expired or open food removed, shelves wiped
  • All surfaces dusted and sanitized
  • Floors vacuumed and mopped throughout
  • Couch cushions fluffed and arranged; throw pillows and blankets reset

Entry, Patio & Shared Spaces

  • Front entryway swept and mat shaken
  • Sliding glass doors wiped (fingerprints, smudges)
  • Laundry started or staged for linen service pickup (per host preference)
  • Damage and missing-item report sent to host within 30 minutes of completion

Pool deck cleaning, game room servicing, and themed-room staging are quoted separately based on your property's specific setup — see the add-on section above.

sections.h2: How Long Does a Resort Home Turnover Clean Take in Kissimmee?
sections.html:
Time is the critical constraint for vacation rental hosts at Storey Lake, Windsor Hills, and Reunion Resort. Most communities enforce an 11 AM checkout / 4 PM check-in window, giving the cleaning crew five hours — sometimes less when guests check out late. Here's what a professional two-person Braza team realistically completes within that window:

Home sizeEstimated clean time (2-person team)Notes
2–3 BR resort home1.5 – 2.5 hoursComfortable within any checkout window
4–5 BR resort home2.5 – 4 hoursPool deck & game room add 45–75 min
6–7 BR resort home4 – 5.5 hours3-person team recommended for tight windows
8–9 BR luxury villa5.5 – 7 hoursSchedule 3-person team; deep cleans require full-day block

Factors that extend the turnaround time:

  • Heavy-occupancy stays (8–12 guests vs. 4–6) — kitchens and bathrooms take longer
  • Late checkout — every 30-minute delay compresses the cleaning window
  • Linen service on-site — washing and drying cycles add 1.5–2 hours unless pre-staged sets are used
  • Post-long-stay deep clean protocol — required after stays of 7+ nights per best-practice standards

If your property has a 3 PM check-in instead of 4 PM, communicate that upfront. Braza schedules crew arrival to match your checkout time, not a generic window.

sections.h2: What Should I Look for in a Cleaning Service for a Gated Resort Community?
sections.html:
Not every cleaning company can reliably serve Storey Lake, Windsor Hills, or Reunion Resort. Gated communities add logistics that eliminate casual or solo operators. Here are the non-negotiables when evaluating a vacation rental cleaning partner in Kissimmee:

  1. Registered with the community's security office. Your cleaner must be able to enter without you present. A professional service pre-registers their crews so gate delays never delay your turnover. Ask directly: "Are you registered at [community name]?"
  2. Licensed, bonded, and insured in Florida. Storey Lake and Windsor Hills HOAs may require proof of insurance before granting contractor access. Uninsured cleaners can invalidate your STR insurance policy if a claim arises during a visit.
  3. Experience with vacation rental, not just residential, cleaning. Resort turnover requires hotel-style staging, damage documentation, and same-day communication — skills that general maid services don't train for.
  4. Consistent crews — not rotating strangers. A team that knows your property's layout, quirks (that one tricky pool gate, the themed room's display shelf), and your staging preferences finishes faster and catches issues first-timers miss.
  5. Digital reporting after every clean. A photo-verified completion report sent before 2 PM gives you time to correct any issue before check-in. This is the single strongest protection against 1-star cleanliness reviews.
  6. Same-day availability and on-call flexibility. Guests who check out early — or stay late — are a daily reality in Kissimmee's high-volume resort market. Your cleaning partner must be reachable and able to adjust same-day.

Braza Cleaning meets all six criteria across Storey Lake, Windsor Hills, and Reunion Resort. We carry active Florida general liability insurance, maintain crew registrations at all three communities, and send a photo report within 30 minutes of completing each clean.

sections.h2: Is Same-Day Turnover Cleaning Available at These Kissimmee Resort Communities?
sections.html:
Yes — same-day turnover cleaning is available at Storey Lake, Windsor Hills, and Reunion Resort for Braza Cleaning's recurring clients. For on-demand same-day requests, availability depends on crew schedule and lead time:

  • Recurring clients (booked calendar-linked): Braza syncs to your Airbnb or VRBO calendar so every turnover is automatically scheduled. Same-day gaps are filled without a phone call.
  • On-demand same-day requests: Text or call (689) 242-7469 before 10 AM for same-day availability. Daytime availability is highest Monday–Thursday; weekend slots fill faster during peak Orlando tourism season (June–August and December–January).

Same-day deep cleans — required after stays of 7+ nights — need a minimum 4-hour window and a 3-person crew for homes above 5 bedrooms. These should be scheduled 48 hours in advance whenever possible.

Pro tip for Windsor Hills & Reunion Resort hosts: Register Braza Cleaning as your approved vendor with the community security office once, and we handle all future gate access on our end. No calls to the gatehouse needed per visit.

Ready to book or get a quote? Request a free quote online or call/text (689) 242-7469 — we confirm pricing within 2 hours.

faq: How much does it cost to clean a 4-bedroom vacation rental at Storey Lake?

A standard turnover clean for a 4-bedroom resort home at Storey Lake runs $190–$255 in 2026. If the stay was 7+ nights, a deep turnover protocol is recommended, which adds 35–45% to the base price. Pool deck and game room cleaning are priced separately — text (689) 242-7469 for an exact add-on quote.
Do you clean vacation rentals at Windsor Hills without the host being present?

Yes. Braza Cleaning crews are registered at Windsor Hills and can check in at the gate independently using the host-provided access code or vendor registration. We send a photo-verified completion report to the host within 30 minutes of finishing every clean.
How do I get my cleaning crew registered at a gated Kissimmee resort community?

Hosts typically submit the cleaner's company name, contact number, and vehicle description to the community's HOA or security management. Braza Cleaning handles this registration process for you — just let us know which community you're in when booking your first clean.
What's the difference between a standard turnover and a deep turnover?

A standard turnover covers all rooms, linens, kitchen, and bathrooms — everything needed to reset the property for the next guest. A deep turnover adds inside-oven cleaning, inside-refrigerator shelving, grout scrubbing, baseboard wiping, and full appliance detail. It's required after stays of 7+ nights or any stay with heavy use.
Can you handle linen service (wash, dry, fold, re-make) at resort communities?

Yes. Braza Cleaning offers on-site linen service — strip, wash, dry, fold, and re-make — quoted per bed count based on your property. Many high-volume hosts use pre-staged linen sets (two sets per bed) so laundry cycles don't delay checkout. We can advise on the best system for your property's booking volume.
How do themed bedrooms affect cleaning time and cost?

Themed rooms — Disney-character, princess, Marvel, and sports setups — require careful handling of decor items and precise placement per the host's staging guide. Each themed or specialty bedroom adds time and complexity to the turnover; pricing is quoted per room configuration when you book. A 2-person team typically adds 20–35 minutes per specialty room.
What happens if guests check out late and the cleaning window is tight?

Braza Cleaning monitors your calendar and adjusts crew arrival to match the actual checkout time. For properties with a 3+ hour window, we can typically still complete the turnover before your check-in time. For very short windows (under 2 hours), we dispatch a 3-person team or escalate to same-day priority scheduling. Communication via text is real-time throughout.
How do I book recurring turnover cleaning for my Kissimmee resort property?

Call or text (689) 242-7469 or fill out the contact form at brazacleaning.com. We'll confirm your community, property size, add-ons, and calendar sync method — and lock in your rate and crew within 24 hours. Recurring clients receive priority scheduling and a fixed rate for the contract period.
